hero.headline: Reliable Plumbing & Heating Services in Dallas
hero.subheadline: From emergency repairs to full system installations, our licensed technicians deliver fast, honest, and lasting solutions.

featureSections.title: 24/7 Emergency Plumbing When You Need It Most
featureSections.body: A burst pipe or overflowing toilet doesn't wait for business hours. That's why Atlas Plumbing offers round-the-clock emergency services throughout Dallas. Our rapid-response team arrives fully equipped to diagnose and resolve your issue, minimizing damage and restoring your peace of mind.
bullets: Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
featureSections.cardBody: Most emergencies are addressed within 60 minutes of your call.

featureSections.title: Water Heater Installation & Repair
featureSections.body: Whether you need a traditional tank or a modern tankless system, our team handles all makes and models. We'll help you choose the right size and energy-efficient option for your home, then install it correctly the first time. Regular maintenance extends your heater's life and prevents unexpected breakdowns.
bullets: Tank and tankless water heater installation
featureSections.cardBody: Upgrading to a high-efficiency water heater can cut your energy costs by up to 30%.

home.whyTitle: Why Dallas Homeowners Choose Atlas Plumbing

whyChooseUs.title: Decades of Local Experience
whyChooseUs.description: Since 1952, we've served Dallas with pride. Our technicians know the local plumbing codes, common issues, and best solutions for homes in our area.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured Professionals
whyChooseUs.description: Every Atlas plumber is fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We undergo continuous training to stay current with the latest techniques and safety standards.

whyChooseUs.title: Upfront Pricing, No Surprises
whyChooseUs.description: We provide a clear, written estimate before any work begins. You'll know exactly what the job costs before we start — no hidden fees or overtime charges.

whyChooseUs.title: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: If you're not happy with our work, we'll make it right. Our reputation is built on trust, quality, and standing behind every job we do.

testimonials.quote: Atlas Plumbing saved us on a Sunday night when our water heater burst. They were at our door within an hour, replaced the unit, and even cleaned up afterward. Professional and fair priced.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We've used Atlas for years — from small leaks to a full repipe. Their team is always courteous, on time, and explains everything clearly. I recommend them to all my neighbors.
testimonials.author: James R.

testimonials.quote: After three other plumbers couldn't fix our drain issue, Atlas diagnosed it in 15 minutes. The repair was done same day and the price was very reasonable. They earned a customer for life.
testimonials.author: Linda T.

cta.headline: Ready to Solve Your Plumbing Problem?
cta.subheadline: Call us now or schedule online for fast, reliable service from Dallas's most trusted plumbers.

servicesPage.intro: From minor repairs to major installations, Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co offers a full range of residential and commercial plumbing services in Dallas. Our experienced technicians use the latest tools and techniques to ensure lasting results. Explore our services below.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency response for burst pipes, severe clogs, gas leaks, and more.
services.longDescription: When a plumbing emergency strikes, every minute counts. Atlas Plumbing provides round-the-clock emergency services throughout Dallas. Our rapid-response team is always on standby, ready to handle any crisis — from flooded basements to broken water mains. We arrive fully equipped to assess, contain, and repair the issue quickly, preventing further damage to your property.
benefits: Free phone consultation to assess urgency

process.title: Step 1: Call & Assess
process.description: Call our emergency line. Our dispatcher will ask key questions to determine the severity and send the nearest available technician.

process.title: Step 2: Rapid Arrival & Diagnosis
process.description: Our plumber arrives within 60 minutes, assesses the situation, and provides a clear estimate before any work begins.

process.title: Step 3: Repair & Cleanup
process.description: We perform the repair using high-quality parts, then clean the work area thoroughly. We'll also advise on preventive measures.

faqs.question: How much does an emergency plumbing call cost?
faqs.answer: Our emergency service fee is $99, which covers the after-hours dispatch. Repair costs are quoted separately based on the work needed, and we always provide an upfront estimate.

faqs.question: Do you handle gas line emergencies?
faqs.answer: Yes, our technicians are trained and certified to handle gas leaks and gas line repairs. If you smell gas, leave your home immediately and call us from outside.

services.title: Water Heater Services
services.shortDescription: Installation, repair, and maintenance for tank and tankless water heaters.
services.longDescription: Hot water is essential for comfort and daily routines. Atlas Plumbing specializes in all types of water heaters — traditional tank, tankless, and hybrid models. We help you select the most energy-efficient unit for your home's needs, install it professionally, and provide ongoing maintenance to extend its lifespan. If your water heater is acting up, our diagnostic experts can pinpoint the issue and recommend the best course of action.
benefits: Expert installation for all major brands
Extended warranties on parts and labor

process.title: Step 1: Consultation & Sizing
process.description: We assess your household's hot water demand and recommend the right size and type of water heater for optimal efficiency and comfort.

process.title: Step 2: Professional Installation
process.description: Our licensed plumbers install the unit according to all local codes, ensuring safe operation and peak performance.

process.title: Step 3: Testing & Walkthrough
process.description: We test the system, check for leaks, and show you how to operate and maintain your new water heater.

faqs.question: How long does a water heater installation take?
faqs.answer: A standard tank replacement typically takes 2-4 hours. Tankless installations may take 4-6 hours due to additional venting and gas line modifications.

faqs.question: What is the average lifespan of a water heater?
faqs.answer: Traditional tank water heaters last 10-15 years, while tankless models can last 20+ years with proper maintenance.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Repair
services.shortDescription: Professional drain cleaning, sewer line repair, and clog removal.
services.longDescription: Slow drains and recurring clogs are more than an inconvenience — they can signal deeper issues in your plumbing system. Atlas Plumbing uses advanced hydro-jetting and video inspection to clear blockages and identify problems like tree root intrusion or pipe damage. We provide thorough cleaning and lasting repairs to restore proper flow and prevent future backups.
benefits: Video camera inspection for accurate diagnosis

process.title: Step 1: Video Inspection
process.description: We insert a high-definition camera into your drain to locate the blockage and assess pipe condition.

process.title: Step 2: Hydro-Jetting or Snaking
process.description: Depending on the clog, we use either a powerful hydro-jet or a motorized auger to clear the line completely.

process.title: Step 3: Post-Clearing Verification
process.description: We re-inspect the line to confirm full flow and recommend any necessary repairs or maintenance.

faqs.question: How often should I have my drains cleaned?
faqs.answer: We recommend professional drain cleaning every 1-2 years for most homes, or more frequently if you have older pipes or recurring clogs.

faqs.question: Will hydro-jetting damage my pipes?
faqs.answer: No, hydro-jetting uses high-pressure water that is safe for all types of pipes, including PVC and cast iron. It effectively removes buildup without chemicals.

services.title: Pipe Repair & Repiping
services.shortDescription: Leak repair, pipe replacement, and whole-home repiping services.
services.longDescription: Leaky or corroded pipes can cause water damage, mold, and high utility bills. Atlas Plumbing provides expert pipe repair and full repiping solutions for Dallas homes. Whether you need a single section replaced or a complete upgrade to modern PEX or copper, our team works efficiently to minimize disruption. We use durable materials and proven techniques to ensure your plumbing system is reliable for years to come.
benefits: Whole-home repiping with minimal wall damage

process.title: Step 1: Leak Detection & Assessment
process.description: We use electronic leak detection equipment to pinpoint the exact location of leaks without unnecessary demolition.

process.title: Step 2: Repair or Repipe Plan
process.description: We present a detailed plan with options — from spot repairs to full repiping — including costs and timeline.

process.title: Step 3: Professional Execution
process.description: Our plumbers perform the work with minimal disruption, clean up thoroughly, and test the system for proper pressure and flow.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need repiping?
faqs.answer: Signs include frequent leaks, low water pressure, discolored water, or pipes that are over 50 years old. A video inspection can confirm the condition.

faqs.question: How long does a full repipe take?
faqs.answer: For an average home, repiping typically takes 2-5 days, depending on the size of the house and the complexity of the layout.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Plumbing Experts Since 1952
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners and businesses with reliable, honest, and high-quality plumbing services — delivered with integrity and respect.
story: Atlas Plumbing & Heating Co was founded in 1952 with a simple mission: deliver dependable plumbing services with old-fashioned work ethic. What started as a small family operation has grown into one of Dallas's most trusted plumbing companies, serving thousands of customers across the metroplex. Our longevity is built on a commitment to quality craftsmanship, transparent pricing, and treating every home like our own.

Today, we continue that tradition with a team of licensed, background-checked technicians who undergo continuous training. We invest in the latest diagnostic tools and techniques to provide efficient, lasting repairs. Whether it's a routine drain cleaning or a complex repipe, we approach every job with the same dedication that has kept our customers coming back for over 70 years.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and stand behind our work. No shortcuts, no hidden fees.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade materials and proven techniques to ensure repairs last.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home with care, arriving on time and leaving the workspace clean.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: Dallas is our home too. We support local causes and take pride in serving our neighbors.

contact.headline: Get in Touch With Atlas Plumbing
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Call us or fill out the form below. We'll respond promptly.
